cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top candidates are selected based on the highest scores from the shortlist, aligning with frequent digits in key positions: position 1 favors 4 and 3, position 2 favors 6 and 5, position 3 favors 9 and 3, position 4 favors 4 and 1, position 5 favors 2 and 9, position 6 favors 1 and 0, and position 7 favors 9 and 3. The top5 are the strongest scoring numbers consistent with these frequencies, and the top50 extends this selection while avoiding duplicates.
